rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify calculations with FEA or physical testing.
Use appropriate safety factors for design.

description.short: Calculate undamped natural angular frequency of spring-mass system.
description.long: Calculate undamped natural angular frequency of spring-mass system.

short_i18n.en: Calculate undamped natural angular frequency of spring-mass system.
short_i18n.tr: Sönümsüz yay-kütle sisteminin doğal açısal frekansını (ω) hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die ungedämpfte Eigenkreisfrequenz eines Feder-Masse-Systems.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la pulsation naturelle non amortie d'un système masse-ressort.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la frecuencia angular natural no amortiguada de un sistema masa-resorte.
short_i18n.ar: حساب التردد الزاوي الطبيعي غير المخمد لنظام كتلة-نابض.

long_i18n.en: Calculate undamped natural angular frequency of spring-mass system.
long_i18n.tr: Sönümsüz yay-kütle sisteminin doğal açısal frekansını (ω) hesaplar.
long_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die ungedämpfte Eigenkreisfrequenz eines Feder-Masse-Systems.
long_i18n.fr: Calculer la pulsation naturelle non amortie d'un système masse-ressort.
long_i18n.es: Calcular la frecuencia angular natural no amortiguada de un sistema masa-resorte.
long_i18n.ar: حساب التردد الزاوي الطبيعي غير المخمد لنظام كتلة-نابض.
